$description: Angular v17+ block-syntax grammar REFERENCE CHECKLIST for the #2113 grammar-fidelity scorecard — WE-owned data, not scorer code. Covers the double-curly interpolation ({{ }}) plus the v17+ control-flow block grammar (@if/@else/@for/@empty/@switch/@case/@default) — the bare-brace close '}' is the third declared-close shape named in #2074's Fork 3 scope enumeration. Attribute-keyed constructs ([prop], (event), *ngIf) are out-of-scope per statute → the #1986 attribute registry (declared as scorecard rows per #2117's scope enumeration). Each construct names its opening delimiter + expected #2074 nature; outOfScope marks concerns the #2074 statute does not own. The scorer (frontierui:plugs/webnodes/grammarScorecard.ts scoreGrammar) grades each construct reproduced/partial/out-of-scope/gap. This checklist carries ZERO scorer logic.
